'''laroso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiornithean|enantiornithean]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiornithean|enantiornithean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| laroso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læreseth|læreseth]] || [[word:læresej|læresej]] || [[word:læresesh|læresesh]] || [[word:lærese|lærese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:larorosoth|larorosoth]] || [[word:larorosoj|larorosoj]] || [[word:larorososh|larorososh]] || [[word:laroroso|laroroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:larosoth|larosoth]] || [[word:larosoj|larosoj]] || [[word:larososh|larososh]] || [[word:laroso|laroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:larofsoth|larofsoth]] || [[word:larofsoj|larofsoj]] || [[word:larofsosh|larofsosh]] || [[word:larofsof|larofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:larosotho|larosotho]] || [[word:larosojo|larosojo]] || [[word:larososho|larososho]] || [[word:larosoko|larosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:larosoth|larosoth]] || [[word:larosoj|larosoj]] || [[word:larososh|larososh]] || [[word:laroso|laroso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:larosothol|larosothol]] || [[word:larosojol|larosojol]] || [[word:larososhol|larososhol]] || [[word:larosokol|larosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:larosothotho|larosothotho]] || [[word:larosojojo|larosojojo]] || [[word:larososhosho|larososhosho]] || [[word:larosoko|larosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:larosothon|larosothon]] || [[word:larosojon|larosojon]] || [[word:larososhon|larososhon]] || [[word:larosokon|larosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:larosothoro|larosothoro]] || [[word:larosojoro|larosojoro]] || [[word:larososhoro|larososhoro]] || [[word:larosokoro|larosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
